title: DimensionRed's Alchemy
description: Refresh your perspective on potions with brand new 3D models. Dust off your cauldron and dive into magic anew!
body:
![A logo for a mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18b91e954ea1a35061f2a5470d9a49b707fc4d4f.jpeg) ###

Main info

> **Red's Alchemy Anew**, a.k.a **DimensionRed's Alchemy** is a resourcepack, created to change the view of regular alchemy you see in Minecraft. Work is still in progress, future mod support planned! ![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab7299bd81aed7dde60b6cc8fecedd02ca022d96_0.webp)

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab7299bd81aed7dde60b6cc8fecedd02ca022d96_0.webp) ![View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39643d2ff6b3f334e3041afe9b4a309f0f4056a9.jpeg) ![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab7299bd81aed7dde60b6cc8fecedd02ca022d96_0.webp)
Models:

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc32c73aaae836f8bdf99c889f20f69ae0f7dfdc_0.webp) ![Dependency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f488205a1d5b0338eec2c1dc747670df910cc665.png) > DimensionRed's Alchemy supports cauldron skin under ```data=0``` for Just Like Cauldron. Skin can be applied by using honeycomb on a regular cauldron. The resourcepack itself will work even without this mod installed.

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc32c73aaae836f8bdf99c889f20f69ae0f7dfdc_0.webp) ![Bottles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f722f1f207b26e23bad37809d2e2f8916cd13a3.jpeg) ![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc32c73aaae836f8bdf99c889f20f69ae0f7dfdc_0.webp) ![Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58d89ab8ed022bd03641445a11be97790f93257f.png) > Future updates will support custom models for bottle-like and potion-like items, allowing them to adapt to resource pack design. >
Currently supported:

Here be supported mods.

None yet :(.

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc32c73aaae836f8bdf99c889f20f69ae0f7dfdc_0.webp) ![View 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aad71ff4eeb278f8503005b0d474d062ea6e58c.jpeg)
